creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 151314
The port in shar format

- Removed FETCH_DEPENDS, FETCH_CMD and DISABLE_SIZE variables
- Adapted to regular fetch method by using "&dummy=/" inside of MASTER_SITES address
- Replaced DIST_SUBDIR with versioned DISTFILES
- Changed kde-look.org to opendesktop.org for WWW
